name: Flodesk Email Marketing API
what_it_does: Design-focused email marketing platform with REST API — enabling creators, small businesses, and entrepreneurs to build beautiful email campaigns and automated sequences with a drag-and-drop builder, subscription forms, checkout pages (Flodesk Checkout), and basic list management, with flat-rate pricing regardless of subscriber count.
use_cases: Subscribing users to Flodesk email lists via API for form and checkout integrations
Triggering Flodesk automation workflows based on external events via API
Managing subscriber data and list segmentation programmatically
Integrating Flodesk with e-commerce platforms for order-triggered email sequences
Pulling subscriber and campaign performance data for marketing analytics
not_for: Enterprise marketing automation with complex workflows (use HubSpot or Marketo)
Transactional email (use Postmark or SendGrid for transactional)
B2B marketing automation with CRM integration (use HubSpot or ActiveCampaign)
best_when: A creator, solopreneur, or small business needs beautifully designed emails with simple automation — at a flat monthly rate that doesn't increase as the list grows.
avoid_when: You need advanced segmentation, complex behavioral automation, transactional email, or integration depth with enterprise systems.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for subscriber events (new subscriber, unsubscribe). REST API for subscriber management and list operations. Zapier integration for no-code automation. No fine-grained scopes. Flodesk Checkout has separate payment integration via Stripe.

pricing.paid_tiers: Email $38/month (flat rate, unlimited subscribers); Everything $64/month (includes Checkout)
pricing.notes: Los Angeles company. Founded 2018. Raised $8M Series A (2021). Backed by Female Founders Fund, Homebrew. Women-founded (Martha Bitar and Rebecca Shostak). Design-first positioning — prettiest templates in email marketing. Flat-rate pricing regardless of subscriber count is key differentiator for growing creators. 100,000+ customers. Strong among bloggers, coaches, photographers, designers. Instagram-acquired aesthetic.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per account; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for subscriber management and list operations. OAuth2 auth. Good but limited public API documentation. Primarily a UI-driven product — API is for basic integration. Webhook for subscriber events. Automation sequences configured in Flodesk UI only. Zapier integration available for no-code automation. Limited automation API.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Subscriber reads fully idempotent. List reads idempotent. Subscriber creation uses email as unique key — upsert semantics.
known_agent_gotchas: Limited API — primarily for subscriber management, not campaign management
Automation sequences not configurable via API — must use Flodesk UI
Flat-rate pricing is per account (not per seat) — only one admin account
CAN-SPAM and CASL compliance required — unsubscribe must be honored within 10 business days
Design-focused product — template customization limited to Flodesk's design system

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, CAN-SPAM, CASL compliant. US data residency. OAuth2 auth. Subscriber email data is PII — handle per GDPR and CAN-SPAM. Flodesk Checkout stores payment metadata via Stripe — no direct payment data in Flodesk. Unsubscribe compliance required within 10 business days (CAN-SPAM).
